description_long: This is a tall, narrow ladder constructed primarily from wood, featuring two parallel side rails and a series of evenly spaced horizontal rungs. The wood has a dark, polished finish, giving the ladder a classic and sturdy appearance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The rungs are slightly rounded and appear to be securely fastened to the side rails, providing stable footing for climbing. The side rails are straight and uniform in thickness, with no visible reinforcements or additional safety features at the base or top. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, with no decorative elements or branding visible. This ladder would typically be used for accessing elevated areas such as rooftops, shelves, or maintenance points in garages, alleys, or construction sites.
description: A tall, dark wooden ladder with evenly spaced rungs and a polished finish, designed for climbing in urban settings. Its simple, sturdy construction makes it suitable for accessing elevated areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the ladder, with all rungs and both side rails clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the ladder's narrow profile and the depth of the side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rungs and rails from the opposite side, with the same rung spacing visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the slimness and straightness of the ladder's structure.
